query: color banding posterized gradient sky digital artifact
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / color_inconsistency — color banding in skies, posterization artifacts

response.objective_caption: An elevated view of a residential cityscape at twilight, with multiple mid-rise apartment buildings and dense tree canopies occupying the lower frame. In the distance, a mountain range lies beneath a turbulent cloud layer that fills most of the sky. Several buildings catch a warm golden light on their facades, while a small patch of brighter sky appears through breaks in the upper clouds.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An elevated twilight view of a residential cityscape with apartment buildings, trees, and distant mountains beneath a turbulent sky. The image features extreme underexposure that crushes the lower half into deep black silhouettes, destroying visible detail in the foreground architecture and vegetation. The heavy storm clouds and dark, oppressive tonal range create an atmosphere of dread and unease throughout the frame.
